PREFIX wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
ASK WHERE {
  [] wdt:P31 wd:Q29287 ; wdt:P1197 ?denom .
  ?denom wikibase:quantityAmount ?amount ; wikibase:quantityUnit wd:Q19190 .
  FILTER(?amount = 5000)
}
